projectDescription: A visual theme generator for creating accessible, shareable color palettes with WCAG contrast auditing.
keyFeatures: Real-time theme preview with live updates
WCAG contrast ratio auditing (AA and AAA standards)
Smart random palette generator with locked color support
Multi-format export (CSS variables, Tailwind CSS v3/v4, SCSS)
Light and dark mode with independent palettes
Color locking system for preserving specific colors
EyeDropper API integration for screen color picking
publicApiSurface: ThemeProvider - React context provider for theme management
useTheme() - Hook for accessing theme state and actions
generateColorPalette() - Generate accessible color palette from base color
getContrastRatio() - Calculate WCAG contrast ratio between colors
getWCAGContrastResult() - Get detailed WCAG compliance results
adaptColorsForMode() - Adapt colors between light and dark modes
pickOnColor() - Calculate optimal text color for background
mixOklch() - Mix colors in OKLCH color space
Theme type - TypeScript interface for theme structure
SavedTheme interface - Structure for saved user themes
